kw.name: New Page

suite.name: suite S1781363563007 2

test.name: TC_001 — Connexion avec un utilisateur bloqué

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On Login Page
Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://www.saucedemo.com
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="login-button"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Credentials
Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'locked_out_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[data-test="login-button"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Then Login Error Message Is Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=[data-test="error"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: And Login Error Contains Locked Message
Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'Doe' in the given field.

kw.msg: Fills the text '12345' in the given field.

suite.doc: SauceDemo end-to-end test suite covering login, sorting, cart, checkout, logout and product detail

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
